digest.en: The US Navy chief is leaving his post effective immediately. The Pentagon made the announcement as tensions rise in the Middle East. US President Donald Trump says there is no timeframe for ending the conflict in the region.
digest.hi: ईरान और अमेरिकी तनाव के बीच कंडोम की कीमतें बढ़ सकती हैं। ईरान में कंडोम की कमी और महंगाई की खबरें हैं। अमेरिकी नाकेबंदी के कारण ईरान की अर्थव्यवस्था पर दबाव बढ़ रहा है।

articles.title: Clearing Hormuz Strait mines could take six months: Report
articles.summary: A report estimates that clearing mines from the Hormuz Strait could take six months. The strait is a crucial waterway for global oil shipments. Mines were recently discovered in the area.

articles.title: Trump says there is ‘no timeframe’ for ending conflict
articles.summary: US President Trump stated that there is no timeframe for ending the conflict with Iran. The comment comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations. Diplomatic efforts have been underway to ease tensions.

articles.title: Iran says won’t reopen Hormuz if US upholds naval blockade
articles.summary: Iran warned it won't reopen the Hormuz Strait if the US upholds a naval blockade. The strait is a vital route for oil exports. Iran made the statement after attacks on ships in the strait.

articles.title: Iran says won't reopen Hormuz if U.S. upholds naval blockade
articles.summary: Iran said it won't reopen the Hormuz Strait if the US maintains a naval blockade. Tensions remain high around the trade route. The US and Iran have been exerting economic pressure on each other.

articles.title: What’s happening on day 55 after Trump extended ceasefire?
articles.summary: On day 55 of a ceasefire, Iran expressed a desire for talks with the US. However, Iran cited US breaches of commitments, a blockade, and threats as reasons for stalled negotiations. The two nations have been engaged in a tense standoff.

articles.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
articles.summary: US Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving his post. The Pentagon said it is effective immediately. US Navy Secretary John Phelan is the latest high-ranking military leader to leave the administration in recent months.

articles.title: Rajasthan’s Jadeja pleased with middle order's response under pressure
articles.summary: Rajasthan's middle order showed resilience under pressure, according to Jadeja. The team's performance was satisfactory, with players stepping up in critical situations. Rajasthan’s Jadeja pleased with middle order's response under pressure.

articles.title: Donald Trump’s ‘Naughty and Nice’ NATO List Sparks Fresh Alliance Tensions
articles.summary: Donald Trump's 'Naughty and Nice' NATO list has sparked fresh tensions within the alliance. The list reportedly categorized member countries based on their defense spending. Donald Trump’s ‘Naughty and Nice’ NATO List Sparks Fresh Alliance Tensions Open Magazine.

articles.title: Trump administration flies 10-year-old back from Cuba amid custody fight
articles.summary: The US Department of Justice flew a 10-year-old from Utah back from Cuba amid a custody dispute. The child's parents are involved in a legal fight over the child's care.

articles.title: Will Strait Of Hormuz Open This Year? What Report Said
articles.summary: A recent report suggested Iran may struggle to open the Strait of Hormuz this year. The report claimed Iran had difficulty locating mines laid in the waterway. A recent report claimed Iran was unable to find the mines it laid in the Hormuz.

articles.title: Two trains collide injuring several
articles.summary: Two trains collided in Denmark, injuring several people. The incident occurred recently, with emergency services responding to the scene to treat the injured. Two trains have crashed into each other in Denmark, leaving several people injured, according to media reports.

articles.title: FBI Investigated Reporter Who Wrote Article About Kash Patel's Girlfriend
articles.summary: The FBI interviewed Kash Patel's girlfriend, Alexis Wilkins, as part of an investigation. The agency did not disclose the nature of the inquiry or whether Wilkins was a target of the probe.

articles.title: Two Pakistanis to be China’s first foreign astronauts: reports
articles.summary: Pakistanis will be China's first foreign astronauts, according to reports. This development reverses regional optics, with a Pakistani astronaut set to orbit before an Indian one. A Pakistani astronaut in orbit ahead of an Indian one as part of the ‘Gaganyaan’ mission is at minimum a reversal of the usual regional optics.

articles.title: Donald Trump should lift the blockade
articles.summary: Donald Trump is urged to lift a blockade in exchange for Iran easing restrictions on the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran should also step back from maximalist positions for sanctions relief and security guarantees.

articles.title: ‘Ceasefire continues, so does economic pressure on Iran’, says White House press secretary
articles.summary: The White House press secretary said Iran's economic pressure continues despite the ceasefire, with no indication of a time frame for ending the war. The US maintains economic pressure on Iran.

articles.title: Democrats up in Virginia, but US voters may pay price for redistricting war
articles.summary: Congressional redistricting in the US has led to a surge in gerrymandering, experts warn. The unprecedented flurry of tit-for-tat redrawing of electoral maps risks significant electoral consequences. Experts say unprecedented flurry of tit-for-tat congressional redistricting risks surge in gerrymandering.

articles.title: Pakistan should clamp down on terror groups like LeT, JeM: U.S. lawmaker
articles.summary: U. S. Congressman Brad Sherman called on Pakistan to crack down on terror groups like LeT and JeM. Sherman remembered the victims of the Pahalgam attack on its first anniversary. The U. S.

articles.title: Iran seizes Gujarat-bound container ship in Strait of Hormuz; chilling video shows armed soldiers
articles.summary: Iran seized a container ship bound for Gujarat in the Strait of Hormuz. Armed soldiers were seen in a video, heightening tensions in the region. Iran seizes Gujarat-bound container ship in Strait of Hormuz; chilling video shows armed soldiers.

articles.title: Iran Mocks Trump's Ceasefire Extension With AI Video
articles.summary: Iran created an AI video mocking US President Trump, showing him agree to extend a ceasefire. The video ends with AI Trump saying he'll extend the ceasefire. Iran Mocks Trump's Ceasefire Extension With AI Video.

articles.title: Israel accused of war crimes after 'targeted' killing of journalist
articles.summary: Israel faced accusations of war crimes after killing a journalist in southern Lebanon. The reporter was targeted in a strike, sparking concerns about Israel's actions. Israel has again been accused of targeting journalists after the death of a reporter working in southern Lebanon.

articles.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
articles.summary: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after an air strike killed a journalist. Israel's actions also hindered rescuers from reaching the site. Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

articles.title: ईरान जंग के कारण महंगे हो सकते हैं कंडोम
articles.summary: ईरान जंग के कारण कंडोम की कीमतें बढ़ सकती हैं। कंडोम बनाने वाली सबसे बड़ी कंपनी के सीईओ ने बताया कि मांग 30% बढ़ी है, लेकिन जंग के कारण उत्पादन प्रभावित हो सकता है। इससे कीमतें बढ़ सकती हैं।

hi.title: ईरान जंग के कारण महंगे हो सकते हैं कंडोम

articles.title: 'भारत के साथ व्यापारिक मुद्दों पर सहमति बनाना आसान नहीं', व्यापार समझौते पर बोले अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधि
articles.summary: अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधि ने कहा कि भारत के साथ व्यापारिक मुद्दों पर सहमति बनाना आसान नहीं है। वे व्यापार समझौते पर बात कर रहे हैं, लेकिन अभी तक कोई agreement नहीं हुआ है।

articles.summary: ईरान के इस्लामिक रिवोल्यूशनरी गार्ड कॉर्प्स ने बुधवार को तीन कार्गो जहाजों पर हमला किया और दो को ज़ब्त कर लिया. यह घटना ईरान जंग को लेकर ट्रंप की ओर से युद्धविराम को बढ़ाये जाने के बाद हुई.
